title: Lazy skill discovery regression (Outlook/email)
summary: Investigate why skill_find/skill_use expose only 4 native skills and fail to load lazy Outlook/email skills despite populated lazy vault and configured plugin.
acceptance_criteria: No regression of low-token skill architecture
notes: Plan rewritten 2026-05-02 for Build-agent executability: all skill_find/skill_use calls removed from executable phases; replaced with filesystem checks + explicit PowerShell commands
Phase 4 validation (skill_find/skill_use smoke tests) reserved for Planner/Human post-restart
Path discrepancy documented: lazy-loaded-skills.md cites old lazy-skills path; actual vault is .opencode-lazy-vault

EXECUTED 2026-05-02T22:15Z: Phases 0-3 complete. Plugin reinstalled @1.2.5. 5 stale doc refs fixed. microsoft-graph skill moved from native dirs to lazy vault (was leaking into system prompt). npm doctor: minor version lag only (not critical). 12 false-positive frontmatter flags (tool_context appears before name).

ROOT CAUSE 2026-05-02T22:45Z: Config was at ~/.config/opencode/.opencode-skillful.json but plugin searches ~/.config/opencode-skillful/, ~/.config/ directly, and ~/ — NOT ~/.config/opencode/. Fixed by moving to C:\Users\DaveWitkin\.config\opencode-skillful\.opencode-skillful.json
SMOKE TESTS PASSED 2026-05-02T23:00Z: skill_find '*' returns 48 skills (was 4). skill_use with underscores works. Token guardrail confirmed. microsoft-graph frontmatter fixed (pending next restart).
IMPORTANT: skill names in skill_use use underscores (outlook_email_search) not hyphens, matching the plugin's name normalization from YAML frontmatter.
